welcome.tagline: I explore, build, and connect — every project starts from genuine curiosity.

about.description: A Frontend Dev with the soul of an explorer: I travel, observe, ask questions, and turn it all into clean, human-centered UI. I like understanding what drives people — and building experiences around that. I work at the intersection of aesthetics, logic, and humanity. My curiosity always starts with people: I love observing them in social contexts, learning unusual things or diving deep into complex topics. Urban photography is one of the ways I do this best — freezing a moment, a shadow, a person who doesn't know they're being watched. I'm the one who asks questions (tactfully) because I genuinely want to understand what moves someone, what excites them, what makes them stay. And once I understand it, it comes naturally to translate that into experience choices: a simpler flow, more human microcopy, a detail that makes you smile.

easy_go.description: A multi-step wizard for collecting travel preferences. Each step features an animated dinosaur that walks and jumps over obstacles — because planning a trip should be as fun as the trip itself.

linoir.description: An Angular application with PWA architecture and containerized deployment via Docker. A project that pushed me beyond the UI, into infrastructure and the DevOps world.

countdown_pet.description: An interactive virtual pet that lives alongside your timer. Pet it, feed it, watch it react — because even the time that counts deserves a little company.

qr_anniversary.description: A small act of love in code: generates personalized QR codes to gift on special occasions. Because the most beautiful creativity is the kind that connects people.

deskmate.description: A personal workspace companion built with React and TypeScript. A clean, minimal interface designed to keep your desk — and your mind — organized. Because a good tool should feel invisible, yet always there.

contact.tagline: Have an idea, a project, or just want to chat? Write to me.
